title: PlasmoPack
description: Modpack for comfortable gaming on PlasmoCore
body:
![PlasmoPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f26284cd2b8a65029f6580de491a2603b5616a9.png)



PlasmoPack - is a modpack designed for comfortable gameplay on the PlasmoCore server. Created by the creator of the PlasmoCore server, Festion.

The modpack contains an optimization pack, a voice chat pack, an emotion pack, and a pack of various utilities.
